topics.topic_en: June 3 Local Elections Final Candidate Registration
topics.topic_ko: 6.3 지방선거 후보 등록 마감 및 판세
topics.summary: May 15 is the official candidate registration deadline for the June 3 local elections. The DPK holds a commanding lead in national polls but faces narrowing margins as PPP rallies conservative bases in PK (Busan-Kyeongnam) and TK regions, with PPP support climbing to 23% against DPK's 45%.

evidence_headlines.title: [6.3 지방선거③] 흔들리는 PK 보수 텃밭… 민주 공세냐 국힘 수성이냐
[갤럽] 지방선거 앞, 당정 지지율 동반하락…보수진영 결집세
사상 시의원선거 구의원 출신 앞세운 민주…수성 나선 국민의힘 [PK 기초지자체 판세 분석]

topics.topic_en: Yoon Insurrection Appeal Stalled by Judge Recusal
topics.topic_ko: 윤석열 내란 항소심 법관기피 신청 변수
topics.summary: Yoon Seok-yeol's Seoul High Court insurrection appeal, following his February life-sentence verdict, was derailed on May 13–14 when his defense filed a judge-recusal motion; proceedings are suspended pending the court's ruling, adding uncertainty just before the June 3 elections.

evidence_headlines.title: 법원 '내란 우두머리' 윤석열 1심 무기징역 선고
윤석열 '내란 우두머리' 2심 재판 시작…법관기피 신청 '변수'
尹 '내란 우두머리' 항소심 재판부 기피 신청..."유죄 예단, 공평 재판 기대 못해"

topics.topic_en: DPK Fabricated Prosecution Special Counsel Bill
topics.summary: The ruling DPK's proposed special counsel bill, which would grant authority to withdraw prosecution charges in cases linked to President Lee Jae-myung, has triggered a fierce PPP counteroffensive and internal DPK dissent; Gallup polling shows 44% public opposition to the bill's charge-dismissal power versus 27% in favour.

evidence_headlines.title: 민주당 "조작기소 바로잡을 특검 필요" vs 국민의힘 "셀프 면죄부"
與 조작기소 특검법 역풍 '보수 결집'...서울·영남 지지율 격차 확 줄었다
與 조작기소 특검법 수정론 확산…野 총공세 박차

topics.topic_en: Lee Jae-myung Approval Dips as PPP Consolidates
topics.topic_ko: 이재명 지지율 소폭 하락·국민의힘 보수 결집
topics.summary: Gallup Korea's May 12–14 survey recorded President Lee's approval at 61%, down 3 percentage points week-on-week, while PPP party support rose to 23% — the party's highest in months — reflecting partial conservative consolidation driven by opposition to the special counsel bill.

evidence_headlines.title: 李대통령 지지율, 3%p 떨어진 61%…민주 45%·국민의힘 23% [한국갤럽]
이 대통령 지지율 65.5% 취임 후 최고‥민주당 50.5%·국힘 31.4%
[이슈분석]이재명 대통령 국정 지지율 60.7%...6월 지방선거 여당 승리 전망 58.7%

topics.topic_en: Constitutional Amendment Referendum Blocked by PPP Boycott
topics.topic_ko: 개헌 국민투표 무산 — 국민의힘 표결 불참
topics.summary: The PPP's refusal to participate in the May 7 National Assembly vote caused a constitutional amendment referendum — supported by six other parties and planned to coincide with the June 3 local elections — to fail for lack of quorum, drawing broad criticism and framing the PPP as obstructionist.

evidence_headlines.title: 국회, 개헌안 상정…국힘 불참에 곧 '투표불성립' 선언 전망
[속보] 與 주도 개헌안, 투표 불성립 … 국민의힘 불참
국회, 오늘 개헌안 재표결…투표 무산 땐 '6·3 동시투표' 불발

topics.topic_en: Lee Government Expansionary Fiscal Policy IMF Endorsement
topics.topic_ko: 이재명 정부 확장재정 논쟁 — IMF 평가 인용
topics.summary: President Lee on May 15 publicly shared an IMF assessment endorsing Korea's expansionary fiscal stance, directly rebuking opposition calls for austerity; the exchange signals a broader debate over fiscal credibility and government spending heading into elections.

evidence_headlines.title: IMF "韓 부채 지속가능 수준"…李대통령 "무조건 긴축 주장, 꼭 보시라"
李대통령 "긴축 주장하는 분들 꼭 봐라"…'韓 재정 확장은 매우 적절' IMF 평가 공유
李대통령, IMF 발언 공유 긴축론 반박..."한국 재정확장, 매우 적절"

topics.topic_en: PPP Internal Strife Han Dong-hoon Faction Discipline
topics.summary: The PPP leadership under Jang Dong-hyuk continues to clash with pro-Han Dong-hoon factions; courts have suspended disciplinary actions against Han-aligned figures including Kim Jong-hyuk, deepening intra-party tensions and raising questions about PPP unity ahead of the local election and subsequent party convention.

evidence_headlines.title: 국민의힘, '반특검' 결집..한동훈發 내홍 조짐이 변수
한동훈, 김종혁 징계 효력정지에 "국힘 비정상 만든 사람에 책임 물어야"
[D-30] 진짜는 선거 이후 '전당대회'…'정청래·장동혁' 당권 시험대

topics.topic_en: Korea US China Trade Triangle Lee Diplomatic Balancing
topics.summary: President Lee met U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessent and Chinese Vice Premier He Lifeng in Seoul ahead of the Trump-Xi Beijing summit in mid-May, positioning Korea as a diplomatic intermediary and highlighting how geopolitical trade tensions feed into domestic political narratives around economic competence.

evidence_headlines.title: 미·중 무역 수장, 트럼프 방중 직전 서울서 최종 조율… '무역 안정화' 사활
2026년 5월 13일 오늘의 주요 뉴스(삼성전자 노조 협상 결렬 및 반도체 수출 급증과 미중 경제 외교)

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
